source_name: Code4rena Kinetiq Findings and Analysis Report (2025-04)
finding_title: Missing withdrawal pause check in confirmWithdrawal allows bypassing withdrawal restrictions
summary: The StakingManager::confirmWithdrawal() function does not include the whenWithdrawalNotPaused modifier, despite being a withdrawal operation. According to the natspec docs of pauseWithdrawal(), it should pause all withdrawal operations:
root_cause: withdrawal pause coverage gap: confirmWithdrawal lacks whenWithdrawalNotPaused even though it completes the withdrawal operation
broken_invariants: pausing withdrawals must block both queueing and confirmation paths that release HYPE to users
all withdrawal lifecycle functions must enforce the same withdrawal-specific pause gate
users must not be able to bypass emergency withdrawal restrictions by entering through a later lifecycle stage
attack_preconditions: Protocol state reaches the report-described edge case or queue configuration
Relevant manager/operator/user flow is executed as described in the public finding
attacker_capability: external user or operational actor able to trigger the affected protocol path
trigger_actions: execute the affected function sequence described in the report
observe accounting/state transition divergence or operation failure

impact.description: The StakingManager::confirmWithdrawal() function does not include the whenWithdrawalNotPaused modifier, despite being a withdrawal operation. According to the natspec docs of pauseWithdrawal(), it should pause all withdrawal operations:

why_not_higher: the report classified this as Medium rather than High; impact is bounded to disruption, bypass, or indirect value loss rather than unconditional total protocol loss
why_not_lower: included as a validated High/Medium C4 finding with concrete affected code paths and exploit/impact narrative
common_false_positive_angles: check whether the affected function is actually reachable under current roles/pauses/configuration
check whether sponsor mitigations or operational assumptions fully eliminate the stated state transition
check whether the code version and line links match the audited commit
mitigations: Add withdrawal pause modifier - function confirmWithdrawal(uint256 withdrawalId) external nonReentrant whenNotPaused { + function confirmWithdrawal(uint256 withdrawalId) external nonReentrant whenNotPaused whenWithdrawalNotPaused { uint256 amount = _processConfirmation(msg.sender, withdrawalId); // ... }
